violations.description: Ensure an element's role supports its ARIA attributes
violations.help: Elements must only use supported ARIA attributes

violations.description: Ensure role attribute has an appropriate value for the element
violations.help: ARIA role should be appropriate for the element

violations.description: Ensure aria-hidden elements are not focusable nor contain focusable elements
violations.help: ARIA hidden element must not be focusable or contain focusable elements

violations.description: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
violations.help: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds

violations.description: Ensure elements have alternative text or a role of none or presentation
Ensure image alternative is not repeated as text
violations.help: Alternative text of images should not be repeated as text

violations.description: Ensure the document has a main landmark
violations.help: Document should have one main landmark

violations.description: Ensure that lists are structured correctly
violations.help: <ul> and <ol> must only directly contain <li>, <script> or <template> elements

violations.description: Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks
violations.help: All page content should be contained by landmarks

violations.description: Ensure <svg> elements with an img, graphics-document or graphics-symbol role have an accessible text
violations.help: <svg> elements with an img role must have an alternative text
